lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: That woman at the bar helped the injured traveler without asking for coin.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: She's positioning herself as trustworthy. Better customers that way, obviously.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Or maybe kindness matters to her regardless of profit. Did you consider that?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: I consider what I see. Though... she didn't mention it to anyone, so.
